[[BLOCK:p_59]]
Lecturer Introduction

[[BLOCK:p_61]]
Fu Siyuanxiang (傅思元翔), Master's Degree from Renmin University of China, Researcher at the Modern Personnel Technology Research Institute of North China Electric Power University, Guest Lecturer at multiple prestigious universities including Peking University, Zhejiang University, and Renmin University of China, Guest Lecturer at the National Academy of Governance, Guest Lecturer at the Research Center of the State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission of the State Council, Visiting Professor at Beijing Huaxia Management College, Instructor at Youmi Online, and Guest Commentator for Guangxi Satellite TV.
